fields.name: messageId
fields.description: Unique identifier for this arrears status message

fields.name: timestamp
fields.description: Date and time when the message was generated

fields.name: sourceSystem
fields.description: Originating system identifier; always CREDIT_DEPARTMENT for this message type

fields.name: destinationSystem
fields.description: Target system identifier; always CUSTOMER_SERVICES for this message type

fields.name: arrears_status
fields.description: Collection of arrears status records for customer accounts

children.name: accountNumber
children.description: The account number associated with the arrears status

children.name: productType
children.description: The type of financial product held by the customer

children.name: arrearsAmount
children.description: The outstanding amount in arrears, expressed in the stated currency

children.name: currency
children.description: ISO 4217 currency code for the arrears amount

children.name: arrearsMonths
children.description: Number of months the account has been in arrears

children.name: status
children.description: Current arrears status classification of the account

children.name: startDate
children.description: Date when the arrears period commenced; null if account is not in arrears

children.name: lastPaymentDate
children.description: Date of the most recent payment made on the account

children.name: nextPaymentDueDate
children.description: Date when the next payment is due on the account

children.name: riskLevel
children.description: Assessment of credit risk associated with the arrears status

children.name: actionRequired
children.description: Flag indicating whether customer services action is required on this account

children.name: notes
children.description: Free-text notes providing context or status updates on the arrears case
